---
title: "Figure (score whiteness) — temporal autocorrelation of the per-step score"
author: "Luciano Moffatt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

<!--
Per-ALGORITHM temporal-whiteness diagnostic. 5 ensemble CSVs
figures/data/figure_3_time_dlik_{NR,R,NMR,MR,IR}.csv. Per-step score
   s_t,k = d logL_t / d theta_k  (component_path=="logL", calculus=="derivative",
   sample_index populated, param_index = k), at the TRUE parameter on data simulated there.
A well-specified filter has a WHITE (martingale-difference) score -> ACF(s_t,k)=0 at lags>=1;
a naive filter leaves temporal structure -> non-zero ACF (the memory that becomes the
distorted Fisher / miscalibrated CIs). Only the lag-resolved ACF lives here; the global
scalars (score bias, F!=J) belong with the global-estimate figure.

The score ACF is essentially PARAMETER-INDEPENDENT (lag-1: NR 0.75-0.79, IR -0.001..0.008
across all 4 params) -> the MAIN figure shows ONE representative parameter x 5 algorithms;
the 4-parameter grid (which only confirms the independence) is the SUPPLEMENT.
Significance = mean over recordings +/- 1.96 SE per lag (CI excludes 0 -> non-white); the
single-series 1.96/sqrt(n) band is NOT drawn (it answers a weaker, one-recording question).
-->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
MAIN_PARAM <- "k[off]"   # representative; score ACF is parameter-independent (see supplement)
```

```{r read}
ALGOS <- c("NR", "R", "NMR", "MR", "IR")   # NMR = data-file key
ALAB  <- c(NR = "NR", NMR = "MNR", R = "R", MR = "MR", IR = "IR")   # display: show NMR as MNR
PIDX  <- c(on = 0, off = 1, unitary_current = 2, Num_ch_mean = 5)
PLAB  <- c(on = "k[on]", off = "k[off]", unitary_current = "i", Num_ch_mean = "N[ch]")

read_score <- function(a) {
  dt <- data.table::fread(sprintf("../data/figure_3_time_dlik_%s.csv", a),
                          skip = 1, showProgress = FALSE)
  s  <- tibble::as_tibble(dt[component_path == "logL" & calculus == "derivative" &
                             param_index %in% unname(PIDX) & !is.na(sample_index),
                             .(simulation_index, sample_index, param_index, value)])
  rm(dt); gc(verbose = FALSE)
  s %>% group_by(simulation_index, sample_index, param_index) %>%
    summarise(score = first(value), .groups = "drop") %>%
    filter(is.finite(score)) %>% mutate(algorithm = a)
}

sc <- map_dfr(ALGOS, read_score) %>%
  mutate(algorithm = factor(algorithm, levels = ALGOS),
         param = factor(PLAB[names(PIDX)[match(param_index, PIDX)]], levels = unname(PLAB))) %>%
  arrange(algorithm, param, simulation_index, sample_index)
n_samp <- n_distinct(sc$sample_index)
```

```{r autocorrelation}
LAGMAX  <- min(25, n_samp - 2)
acf_one <- function(x) as.numeric(acf(x, lag.max = LAGMAX, plot = FALSE)$acf)
acf_df <- sc %>% group_by(algorithm, param, simulation_index) %>%
  summarise(a = list(acf_one(score)), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(algorithm, param) %>%
  summarise(M = list(do.call(rbind, a)), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(d = map(M, ~ tibble(lag = 0:LAGMAX, acf = colMeans(.x),
                             se = apply(.x, 2, sd) / sqrt(nrow(.x))))) %>%
  select(algorithm, param, d) %>% unnest(d) %>% filter(lag >= 1)
```

```{r acf-plot}
COL <- "#D55E00"
acf_panel <- function(df, grid = FALSE) {
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(lag, acf)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, colour = "#009E73", linewidth = .4) +
    geom_linerange(aes(ymin = acf - 1.96*se, ymax = acf + 1.96*se), colour = COL, linewidth = .35) +
    geom_point(colour = COL, size = .25) +
    labs(x = "lag", y = expression(ACF(s[t]))) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 9) + theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
  if (grid) p + facet_grid(param ~ algorithm, labeller = labeller(param = label_parsed, algorithm = ALAB))
  else      p + facet_wrap(~ algorithm, nrow = 1, labeller = labeller(algorithm = ALAB))
}
```

```{r main, fig.width = 11, fig.height = 2.6}
# MAIN — score ACF for one representative parameter x 5 algorithms
g_main <- acf_panel(acf_df %>% filter(as.character(param) == MAIN_PARAM))
g_main
ggsave("Figure_3_score_acf.pdf", g_main, width = 11, height = 2.6)
```

```{r supplement, fig.width = 11, fig.height = 8}
# SUPPLEMENT — all 4 parameters (confirms parameter-independence)
g_supp <- acf_panel(acf_df, grid = TRUE)
g_supp
ggsave("Figure_S_score_acf_allparams.pdf", g_supp, width = 11, height = 8)
```

```{r summary-table}
acf_df %>% group_by(algorithm, param) %>%
  summarise(acf_lag1 = round(acf[lag == 1], 3),
            max_abs_acf = round(max(abs(acf)), 3), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = param, values_from = c(acf_lag1, max_abs_acf))
```
